We're introducing Claude for Teachers, providing verified K-12 educators in the US free access to premium Claude capabilities, a library of teaching skills, and a direct connection to evidence-based curricula, mapped to academic standards in all 50 states.
Claude for Teachers also brings in trusted curricular resources like OpenSciEd and IM v.360 from Illustrative Mathematics.
“We've been working with Anthropic on a Gold Standard that sets out industry best practices for safety and privacy in K-12 education,” said Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation of Teachers.
Teachers can also access our newly released AI Fluency for PK-12 Teachers, a course co-created with Teach For America, and a train-the-trainer module co-created with the American Federation of Teachers.

The service integrates with established K-12 resources such as OpenSciEd and Illustrative Mathematics' IM v.360.
Other integrated tools include Coteach for math diagrams, Eedi for diagnostic questions, MagicSchool for content readiness, Snorkl for class insights, TeachFX for classroom talk feedback, and Canva Education for designing learning materials.
Data privacy is a key focus, with a K-12 Data Processing Addendum designed to comply with FERPA.
"It’s important that Anthropic is committing to these principles in their new Claude for Teachers," stated Randi Weingarten, President of the AFT.
This initiative is part of Anthropic's broader educational efforts, supported by a partnership with the Gates Foundation, aiming to improve K-12 learning outcomes through AI.
The company plans to pilot an evaluation of Claude for Teachers in Detroit Public Schools.
Individual educators can sign up for free access by June 30, 2027, for a full year."},{"url":"https://www.forbes.com/sites/danfitzpatrick/2026/07/14/anthropic-launches-ai-for-teachers/","title":"Anthropic Launches AI For Teachers","content":"Anthropic launches Claude for Teachers, ... On July 14, 2026, Anthropic launched Claude for Teachers, giving verified K-12 educators in the US free access to premium Claude capabilities, a library of teaching skills, and evidence-based curricula mapped to academic standards in all 50 states. It ships a classroom-ready version of Claude, but it also opens up new connectors, an open-source skills repository, and a technical write-up for anyone building in education. ## What is Claude for Teachers? **Claude for Teachers is a free offering for verified US K-12 educators that pairs premium Claude capabilities with a curated set of teaching skills and access to evidence-based, standards-aligned curricula.** It's built for the day-to-day work of teaching, including planning lessons, differentiating materials, and making sense of class data, without the planning spilling into every evening.","score":0.8958969,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/anthropic-enters-k-12-classrooms-free-claude-access-teachers-borish-kwlac","title":"Anthropic Enters K-12 Classrooms With Free Claude ...","content":"Anthropic introduced Claude for Teachers on July 14, 2026, offering verified K-12 educators in the United States free access to premium Claude","score":0.88799405,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.instagram.com/p/Daxw1_rDTLw","title":"BREAKING: Anthropic just launched Claude for Teachers. ...","content":"NEW | JULY 2026.
